scriptsComments.watch: Master script that runs both scripts required to watch, build and copy the client in parallel. NOTE: run the test site with `dotnet watch --no-hot-reload` to avoid browser reloads when Umbraco sends token authentication requests to the backoffice
scriptsComments.dev:vite: Starts the vite dev server and watches for changes, incremental builds on file changes
scriptsComments.dev:copy: Monitors the output of the build script and copies the client to the package backoffice folder
scriptsComments.build: Sets the version, builds the client, and runs post-build scripts to copy the client to the package backoffice folder
scriptsComments.build:copy: Sets the version, builds the client, and runs post-build scripts to copy the client to both the package backoffice folder and the test site package backoffice folder
scriptsComments.generate-client: This master script runs all generators in sequence
scriptsComments.generate-client:umbraco: Generates ONLY the needed umbraco client operations into a separate folder.
scriptsComments.set-version: Sets the version in package.json and umbraco-package.json
scriptsComments.prepublishOnly: Pre flight before publishing package to npm, runs npm run set-version, not that a private package can be published to npm, so it is just a placeholder/example.

scripts.build: npm run set-version && tsc && vite build && node scripts/post-build.js
scripts.build:copy: npm run set-version && tsc && vite build && node scripts/post-build.js --copy
scripts.generate-client: npm run generate-client:main && npm run generate-client:umbraco

dependenciesComments.monaco-editor: Articulate Markdown Editor, only required until Umbraco Core editor supports better markdown to HTML processing; see https://github.com/umbraco/Umbraco-CMS/issues/19500
